title: Random Block Chunks
description: Generate every chunk out of a randomly chosen block.
body:
This mod makes it so each chunk in your Minecraft world will consist of one random block.
The only Blocks that stay how they "should" be are Bedrock, End Portal Frames and Spawners to make reaching the End possible, though wood chunks in the Nether are a interesting addition to that journey. ;)
Note that not all blocks are able to generate. Blocks with gravity and TNT for example have been excluded, so they don't cause performance issues.
